# Bitwise And

Bitwise AND operation

```perl
$result = $a & $b;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Bitwise And

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a & $b;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a & $b;
```
